_comment: Parity fixtures for createSize. Each fixture has existing size rows plus the requested name. The expected value is the object returned by createSize(). Both adapters must reproduce `expected` exactly for every fixture.

input.sizes: Array of existing rows from the `sizes` table. Fields: id, name, sort_order, is_hidden, is_removed.
input.request: Object passed to createSize. Field: name.
input.supabaseAssignedId: The id returned by the mocked Supabase insert response.

schema.expected: Object with the new size id, per js/data/contracts/createSize.md.

fixtures.name: 01-empty-database
fixtures.description: Create one size when no sizes exist yet.

fixtures.name: 02-after-existing-sizes
fixtures.description: Create one size after existing sizes are already present.
